about_me.des: I am an AI Lead Researcher and Senior Data Scientist (PhD in Machine Learning) with a strong background in mathematics. I design and deliver end-to-end AI solutions from research and proof of concept to production, including Generative AI, RAG architectures, and machine learning systems. I also lead cross-functional collaboration with business, engineering, and cloud partners to turn data opportunities into measurable impact.

projects.CD4: Design and implementation of machine learning models to optimize pricing strategies.
projects.d3js: Implementation of large-scale web scraping pipelines for market monitoring and competitive intelligence.
projects.Oil: Development of time series forecasting models to predict market trends.
projects.geoloc: Design and deployment of local generative AI architectures including RAG pipelines, agentic AI systems, and MCP-based conversational interfaces for databases.
projects.velov: Development of mathematical and machine learning optimization models for operational and business processes.
projects.Kaggle: Kaggle competitions and solutions with gold medal achievements.

career.KC_ai_lead_des: Collaboration with Finnish R&I and leadership of communication with AWS to support strategic AI initiatives. Led multiple AI research projects including distance measurement, web scraping, inpainting on technical drawings, and an MCP-powered RAG architecture for database querying with LLMs.
career.KC_ai_lead_course1: AI Research, Generative AI, MCP Frameworks, RAG Architectures, Technical Leadership
career.KC_senior_des: Led a project with two team members, delivered a successful PoC with an estimated impact above 15 million, and drove the project to production.
career.KC_senior_course1: Project Leadership, Machine Learning, Data Science, Generative AI
career.KC: PhD, Senior Data Scientist - ML Expert - GenAI
career.KC_des: I joined Konecranes as a data scientist in order to work on Machine Learning and Gen AI related projects.
career.KC_course1: Data Science, Machine Learning, Data Visualization, Generative AI
career.NVC: PhD, Data Science - Machine Learning Consultant
career.NVC_des: I joined Novencia as Data Science Consultant in order to work on Machine Learning and Data Visualization related projects. I worked for Engie on clustering and churn projects on customer data and for Enedis as machine learning R&D referent of the team, code reviewing and machine learning
career.NVC_course1: Data Science, Machine Learning, Data Visualization
career.master2_des: I chose a specialization in Data Science shared between Mathematics and Computer Science section of the University Lyon 1.
career.master2_job: Master Data Science | Université Claude Bernard Lyon 1 (UCBL) - Ecole Centrale - Liris | Lyon
career.master2_course1: Statistical methods and Regression Models, Probabilistic Graphical Models, Graph Complexity and Combinatory, Data Visualization, Cloud Computing, Data Mining, Big Data Analytics, Machine learning
career.internship_des: At Panzani, i developped a tool to analyse promotional operations and to make predictions over incoming promotion's ROI (help with the decision) and i participated to the installation of a Big Data structure (Blob, nifi, Kafka, HDFS, Spark)
career.internship_course1: Data collection, Data cleaning, Machine learning, Preprocessing, Nifi, HDFS, Spark
career.PhD_des: Laboratory: Developing an algorithm (regression) which is capable to predict several outputs with groups of corelated variables among those outputs. Enterprise: Project manager.
career.PhD_course1: Data collection, Data cleaning, Machine Learning, Multi task regression, Correlated output prediction, Papers: Conditionally Decorrelated Multi-Target Regression, ICONIP 2019, // Identifying Conditionally Independent Target Subsets for Multi-Target Regression, ICTAI-IEE 2020
career.master1_des: In June 2016, I completed my first year of master
career.master1_job: Master in Statistics, Computer Science, and Numerical Analysis | UCBL | Lyon
career.master1_course1: Numerical Analysis, Probabilities, Parametric Statistics, Time Series, Dynamical Systems, Stochastic Processes
career.bachelor_des: At June 2015, I obtained my bachelor in general mathematics
